name: io.github.surendranb/google-analytics-mcp
description: Google Analytics 4 MCP server for AI agents and agentic workflows with schema discovery, server-side aggregation, and analysis-ready defaults.

environment_variables.description: Absolute path to your Google Cloud service account JSON key with GA4 property access.
environment_variables.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS

environment_variables.description: Numeric GA4 Property ID to query, for example 123456789.
environment_variables.name: GA4_PROPERTY_ID
